summary: Planned conservative non-mutating classifications for the five live inventory PRs. No close, merge, fix, or security routing actions are safe or allowed by this job.

actions.reason: Keep open as a related, useful docs PR tied to #88737; proof failure blocks any stronger finalization.
Draft state plus an unresolved actionable Codex review finding requires maintainer/author follow-up; the job cannot repair or merge it.
Focused-bug technical judgment is required because the PR mixes the intended session fix with unrelated churn and has failing proof/CI; close/fix/merge are not allowed.
Keep the PR in human review rather than close or merge; it appears useful but crosses enough user-abort/session semantics to require maintainer judgment.
Ready-for-maintainer focused bug fix with sufficient proof, but technical correctness and maintainer-signal gates require human review; no closure action is allowed.

needs_human: #88961: draft PR with unresolved actionable Codex review finding about `plugins.allow` plugin IDs.
#88962: preserveKeys PR has failing proof/CI and unrelated churn, requiring maintainer technical judgment.
#88971: useful user-abort/session semantics change needs maintainer technical/product review before finalization.
#89017: proof-sufficient P1 reconnect/session fix is ready for maintainer look but cannot be merged or closed by this job.
